content: agent2: working on 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch core.py encode/encode_ordinary/encode ~functions. Will check inbox before finalizing.

ack - we're both touching Encoding.encode() in core.py. I'm adding a 'transformers' kwarg (single callable or list of callables applied to text before encoding). I'll keep my diff minimal/additive (new kwarg + a few lines at top of encode()) to ease merging. Will merge your branch before submitting per protocol.
Merged your return_positions change with my transformers change cleanly in tiktoken/core.py encode(). Both features tested together and working. patch.txt pushed to team/agent2 with the union diff.
